abilities.GODDARD'S VENGEANCE: A shoulder-launched rocket that causes explosive damage and knocks back enemies who are within a certain range.
abilities.SMOKESTACK LIGHTNING: Throwable gadget that generates a smoke screen around the projectile.
abilities.CHERRY BOMB: A throwable device that generates several energy bombs on the ground. The bombs are triggered by approach, but detonate after a delay.

abilities.CHUG CHUG: Deploys a multi-function tactical drone that can be controlled remotely.
abilities.MR. PEWPEW: Throws a sentry turret that fires automatically.
abilities.THE WALL: Places a wall of shields formed by pieces of cover across the designated location.

abilities.METEORA: A charging sniper rifle: hold to charge for massive damage (a full charge deals ~150 — a one-shot on most Lancers without HP shard cards). The scope has variable zoom and marks every enemy in its sight. ~2 uses per round, replenishing over time.
abilities.SMOKE SCREEN: A rolling cloud that advances forward and reveals any enemy caught inside; press again to freeze it in place as a temporary vision-blocking wall. ~2 uses per round.
abilities.PAPARAZZI: A trap that automatically attaches to a nearby enemy and keeps them revealed; the marked enemy can destroy/remove it by interacting. ~2 uses per round.

abilities.LIVE WIRE: Deploys an electric trap that deals damage and slows nearby enemies.
abilities.ELECTRIC AVENUE: Summons an electrical cage around the enemies in front of Jaguar, blocking their vision.
abilities.I CAN SEE FOR MILES: Displays the number of enemies ahead, and detects enemies who are low on health or affected by Jaguar's skill. Increases movement speed.

abilities.CHOMPER: Release Chum's best friend, Chomper! He patrols the area he's deployed in and chases down enemies to bite them. Destructible. Feed Chomper different baits to make him enter different modes.
abilities.EXPLOSIVE BAIT: Place explosive bait that sticks to walls and explodes when triggered. Fed this bait, Chomper enters Explosive Mode and follows Chum, charging enemies to explode on contact.
abilities.SMOKING BAIT: Throw bait that generates smoke on impact. Fed this bait, Chomper enters Smoke Mode, releasing a constant stream of smoke; hold fire to control his direction.

abilities.FAST LANE: Dash forwards a short distance. The dash distance is shorter when moving sideways.
abilities.ASHES ASHES: Throws a device that creates a war zone where it hits (damage reduction in the zone).
abilities.HOTHEAD: After a short charge, blinds all enemies looking directly at Corona.

abilities.STATION STATION: Conceals Serket and lets her control the beacon for a limited time. Activating it teleports her to its location. Enemies in the beacon's view show as sandstorms; teleporting/canceling generates a sandstorm at the beacon.
abilities.GOLD DUST WOMAN: Releases a dust tornado that moves forward slowly, slowing enemies in range.
abilities.DILEMMA: Throwable gadget that drags enemies in range towards it.

abilities.EMOTIONAL RESCUE: Deploys a healing field that restores HP over time to Pathojen and allies standing within its range.
abilities.SHROOM WALL: Builds a destructible fungal wall to block a path or create instant cover.
abilities.KILLER QUEEN: Places a fungal trap that deals poison damage over time to enemies when triggered.
abilities.CHEMICAL ROMANCE: Passive: Pathojen is immune to all poison-based attacks and traps (including her own).

abilities.MIDNIGHT RAMBLER: Enter optical cloaking mode, increasing movement speed. Only melee weapons can be used in this mode.
abilities.FADEAWAY: Creates an area in which Zephyr is fully invisible during Midnight Rambler. Her cloaking time is unlimited in this area.
abilities.GET BACK: Deploys a dagger beacon. Reactivate to teleport to it after a short delay. Using this ends the invisibility of Midnight Rambler.

abilities.TELEPORTER: Place two teleporters. Spider can recall them remotely.
abilities.SPIRITED AWAY: Throw a teleportation trap that takes effect after a short delay, teleporting enemies and allied converters in range to where Spider initially used the skill.
abilities.SPIDER WEB: Place a disorienting trap. Enemies who trigger it are briefly blinded, exposed, and slowed.

abilities.HELLO, GOODBYE: Summons a circular sigil in front, revealing enemies within. Moving enemies take damage over time while revealed.
abilities.MISERY ANGEL: Throw a bomb that continuously pulls in nearby enemies and, after a short delay, deals damage to enemies in range. This damage ignores walls and barricades.
abilities.WALK ON THE WILD SIDE: Enters Rift Walk mode, becoming invisible and invulnerable, but unable to see other Lancers.

abilities.ELECTRIC GUITAR: Equip a modified double-barrel guitar shotgun that deals high damage to close-range enemies. Can throw two sticky grenades by holding aim. While equipped, Axon can slide.
abilities.STICKY FINGERS: Throws a bouncing sticky grenade that bounces off surfaces until it sticks to an enemy, or detonates when its timer is up. Two bombs deal ~150 total damage (a kill without HP shard cards).
abilities.SUPER FREAK: When active, Axon is immune to blinds — flashbangs and other vision-blocking tools don't affect him, so he keeps fighting while everyone else is blinded.
abilities.DARKSLIDE: Passive: Axon can slide along the ground.

abilities.ECHOLOCATION: Deploys an echolocation device that periodically reveals surrounding enemies when they move.
abilities.SONIC SURGE: Launches a sonic wave that exposes all enemies. The wave releases a delayed sonic blast that knocks back, dazes, and further exposes enemies. Hold to charge further.
abilities.SOUND OF SILENCE: Dampens the footsteps of the player and surrounding teammates. Grants immunity to enemy Echolocation scans.

abilities.CLONING INCARNATION: Deploy a Beacon, transforming Dex into a clone. Costs 20 HP and caps max health at current health. If the clone is killed, or after 15s, Dex returns to the Beacon.
abilities.MIMIC TRAP: Place a trap that looks like your Beacon. Triggers when destroyed or if an enemy gets too close; slows and damages the enemy.
abilities.SHIELD SCALES: Grow a layer of scales that absorbs one instance of damage (up to 20). Cannot be stacked; disappears after a period.

abilities.CYCLONE STORM: Create a cyclone at the marked position that blocks vision and slows enemies inside. Hold fire to move it; release to set.
abilities.BRANCHING LIGHTNING: Fires a mini plasma bolt that splits into two smaller bolts after a short delay.
abilities.HEROIC ONSLAUGHT: Hurricane gathers electricity to power himself up, gradually increasing damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.SOUL BEACON: Aura equips a Soul Beacon. After pressing FIRE to release it, she possesses an ally to support them. While in this state, Aura cannot be attacked and can control her Soul Beacon: press FIRE to shoot an explosive attack at enemies, or AIM to restore Aura's and the possessed ally's HP. While possessing, Aura can only observe enemies within the ally's sight.
abilities.SOUL GUARDIAN: Aura gathers energy, gaining 15 extra HP for 20 seconds. While possessing an ally, only that ally gains the effect — Aura herself does not. As long as the extra HP isn't removed by hostile means, it rapidly replenishes.
abilities.HARMONIC TIDE: Aura strums her instrument to release a sound wave in front of her. It exposes and slows enemies it touches, while increasing the movement speed of allies in its path.

abilities.FIGHT IN A CAGE: Summons a temporary arena that blocks bullets and projectiles. Enemies inside are silenced and cannot use skills. Attacking the arena makes it disappear faster.
abilities.GLADIATOR: Activates gladiatorial prowess, increasing speed/damage and restoring HP; the lower her HP, the more she can use her skills.
abilities.SPEAR OF KUKULKAN: Throws her spear, creating a field that pulls enemies down and prevents healing. Hold to charge the throw, increasing range.

abilities.WONDERWALL: Wildstyle places a graffiti device on the ground or on a door, creating a paint waterfall that blocks vision in one direction. The paint does not block bullets or projectiles. Enemies passing through it are covered in paint and Stained — exposed and slowed.
abilities.SPRAY PAINT: Wildstyle fires paint from her graffiti gun that splatters on the ground. Enemies who enter the paint zone are slowed, exposed, and take increased damage. This Stained effect persists for a short period after leaving the zone, and the zone itself is temporary.
abilities.COAT OF MANY COLORS: Wildstyle sprays paint on herself or her teammates, granting 15 extra HP. This extra health continuously regenerates for the duration of the skill.

abilities.BLOWIN' IN THE WIND: Dash in the direction of movement, knocking back and stunning enemies around. After killing an enemy, replenish 1 skill use.
abilities.BLADE OF BROKEN DREAMS: Slash forwards to unleash two wind blades that boomerang back; can be recalled mid-flight. Charge for three larger blades.
abilities.GIMME SHELTER: Summons a wind shield that deflects incoming bullets, letting Windwalker move safely across open ground.

abilities.BLOODBANE: Passive: a portion of all damage Calamity deals is converted into Bloodbane and stored; at maximum, she gains a powerful buff.
abilities.SYMPATHY FOR THE DEVIL: Consume stored Bloodbane to heal herself.
abilities.ANGEL OF DEATH: Consume HP to become briefly invincible and pass safely through hazardous areas.

abilities.THIEVES LIKE US: Creates a perfect mirage of herself to deceive enemies.
abilities.SHADOWPLAY: Become temporarily invulnerable (wraith state), letting her traverse dangerous areas safely.
abilities.BOOM BOOM: Detonate explosions centered on both your mirage and yourself, dealing damage and stunning enemies. Explosions can be triggered in wraith state. The one centered on yourself deals higher damage.

note: abilities initially OCR'd from Arsenal>Lancer; the missing/garbled ones (HOLLOWPOINT, PATHOJEN, AXON Super Freak/Darkslide, CALAMITY, WINDWALKER Gimme Shelter, COUNTERFEIT) were filled in from online FragPunk references (no guessing).
source: loadout-grid OCR + in-game lancer screens; missing abilities + spellings cross-checked online (ability names are music/song references, e.g. Rolling Stones/Queen/MCR)
